violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the slicer and ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and pink and black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was actively being cleaned during time of inspection. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026
The cardboard dumpster was miss a lid. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
The painted wall behind the dish machine was observed peeling and with an accumulation of residue. The physical facilities to be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2026
The fan in the dish room was observed with an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of pink, black and clear residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025
Gaskets for the small milk cooler and hot holding unit were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025

Pasta salad was observed held at 74 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were assessed and placed into refrigeration to continue cooling process. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
Gaskets for hot holding unit observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
Dispenser for fruit and vegetable microbial wash was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be properly adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
The following were observed in poor repair: -walk-in freezer gasket -drain cover in warewashing room New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2024

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the walk in cooler and on the milk case next to the storage room. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2024
The floor by the 2 bay sink along the far wall is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2024
The bottom panel at the salad bar and dishwasher were not in good repair. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine observed with black residue. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023

The floor tiles in the back walk-in freezer area observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/05/2024

Inadequate lighting observed in the walk-in cooler. Lighting 6-303.11 Intensity. The light intensity shall be: (A) At least 108 lux (10 foot candles) at a distance of 75 cm (30 inches) above the floor, in walk-in refrigeration units and dry FOOD storage areas and in other areas and rooms during periods of cleaning. Lighting 6-303.11 Intensity. Lighting levels are specified so that sufficient light is available to enable employees to perform certain functions such as reading labels; discerning the color of substances; identifying toxic materials; recognizing the condition of food, utensils, and supplies; and safely conducting general food establishment operations and clean-up. Properly distributed light makes the need for cleaning apparent by making accumulations of soil conspicuous New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

The panel at the salad bar, bulbs at the Pizza hot holding lamp, Vulcan steamer, and sandwich hot holding slider observed not in good repair. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine observed with orange and black residue. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
Ice buildup observed at the dairy chest cooler. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2023
